commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `step-3.7-flash` to the bundled StepFun and StepFun Plan catalogs, makes it the shared default model, and updates StepFun docs plus expected model lists.

PR surface: Source +28, Tests 0, Docs +22. Total +50 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a provider catalog/default feature PR, not a current-main bug report. Source inspection confirms current main and the latest release still use `step-3.5-flash` as the StepFun default.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied live proof plus maintainer judgment on the StepFun default change, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: feat(stepfun): add step-3.7-flash model
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `step-3.7-flash` to the bundled StepFun provider plugin on both surfaces (`stepfun`, `stepfun-plan`).
- Make `step-3.7-flash` the default model (`STEPFUN_DEFAULT_MODEL_ID`); propagates to onboarding + provider registration via the derived `STEPFUN_*_DEFAULT_MODEL_REF`.
- Specs: 262,144 context, reasoning, multimodal input `["text","image","video"]`, cost `input $0.20 / output $1.15 / cached-input $0.04` per 1M tokens (source: https://platform.stepfun.ai/docs/en/guides/models/step-3.7-flash).
- Update tests (`EXPECTED_*_MODELS`) and docs (`docs/providers/stepfun.md`, `docs/concepts/model-providers.md`).

## Files

- `extensions/stepfun/openclaw.plugin.json` — model entries on both providers
- `extensions/stepfun/provider-catalog.ts` — default model id bump
- `src/agents/models-config.providers.stepfun.test.ts` — expected model arrays
- `docs/providers/stepfun.md`, `docs/concepts/model-providers.md`

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: `step-3.7-flash` added + default on `stepfun` and `stepfun-plan`, pricing matching official StepFun docs (input $0.20 / output $1.15 / cached-input $0.04 per 1M).
- Real environment tested: local Vitest (macOS, Node 22).
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  - `pnpm test src/agents/models-config.providers.stepfun.test.ts extensions/stepfun/index.test.ts`
  - manifest resolution check via `node` reading `extensions/stepfun/openclaw.plugin.json`
- Evidence after fix:
  - 2 test files passed, 5 tests passed.
  - Resolved specs (both surfaces): `{"input":["text","image","video"],"ctx":262144,"max":65536,"cost":{"input":0.2,"output":1.15,"cacheRead":0.04,"cacheWrite":0}}`
- Observed result after fix: model ids resolve to `stepfun => step-3.7-flash, step-3.5-flash` and `stepfun-plan => step-3.7-flash, step-3.5-flash, step-3.5-flash-2603`, matching the updated expected arrays; `cacheRead` now `0.04` per docs.
- What was not tested: `pnpm build` could not complete locally due to unrelated dependency resolution failures (`@pierre/diffs`, `@shikijs/langs/*`) in files outside this change. Live StepFun API calls not exercised (no key). Relying on CI for full build + typecheck.
target.author: lit26
